active_topics.name: auto-discover-mimo-det
active_topics.status: Phase 0 baseline completed. Python MIMO detectors (MMSE, AMP, EP, K-Best) validated at 32x16, 16QAM. BER targets met at 12dB.
active_topics.next_action: Phase 1: Implement MIMO-DSL type system and linear-iterative primitive search space

global_notes: Research plan finalized in theme_new.txt. Targeting Nature Machine Intelligence. Five algorithm categories unified in DSL search space.
